unit_of_analysis: One dispatch decision / trip segment for one vehicle in one zone at one decision epoch

day_idx.description: Sequential day number in the simulation

dow.description: Day of week indicator with 0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday,...

hour.description: Hour of day when the decision occurred

vehicle_efficiency_index.description: Vehicle fuel or energy efficiency indicator

maintenance_latent.description: Vehicle maintenance condition. Positive values indicate better vehicle condition (well-maintained), while negative values indicate poorer vehicle condition.

driver_skill_latent.description: Driver skill or safety awareness level. Positive means better driver skill

driver_risk_propensity_latent.description: Driver tendency to take risks while driving

commodity_type.description: Type of goods being transported: general or cold-chain

demand_size.description: Quantity of goods to be delivered

service_time_min.description: Time required to complete service at delivery location

intersection_density.description: Number of intersections along the road segment

road_grade_index.description: Standardized indicator of road slope relative to the network average, where positive values indicate steeper uphill terrain and negative values indicate flatter or downhill terrain.

visibility_km.description: Distance the driver can clearly see ahead

roadworks_indicator.description: Indicates whether road construction is present

traffic_state.description: Traffic condition level: low, medium, high

compatibility_violation.description: Indicates whether vehicle types are compatible with commodity types

distance_km.description: Distance traveled during the trip segment

avg_speed_kmph.description: Average speed during the trip segment

travel_time_min.description: Time required to complete the trip segment

harsh_events.description: Number of aggressive driving events, such as hard braking, rapid acceleration, and sharp turning.

fuel_liters.description: Fuel consumed during the trip segment

co2_kg.description: Carbon dioxide emissions generated during the segment

near_miss.description: Indicator of a safety-critical event where a collision was narrowly avoided, representing elevated crash risk without an actual accident.

on_time.description: Indicates whether delivery was completed on schedule
